name: Sweet & Sour Vegetables Ff (Rbfv65a)
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Prepare the sauce ahead of time. In a deep cooking pot, preferably lined, pour about 1 cup of unsweetened pineapple juice and combine with brown sugar or honey, balsamic vinegar, soy sauce, vegetable bouillon, arrowroot, and Tabasco. Drain water chestnuts and bamboo shoots well, rinse in fresh water, and set aside.
1. Heat the wine over high heat in the pot. If using lecithin, add it and stir vigorously.
2. Sauté carrots for about five minutes before adding other vegetables.
3. Add pepper, cauliflower, onions, green onions, garlic, and ginger. Stir constantly and add small amounts of wine as needed to keep the bottom of the pot somewhat dry.
4. When vegetables are softened, add broccoli and pea pods, stirring vigorously until sautéed for a few minutes. Cover and cook if necessary by adding more wine.
5. Add tofu (if used), pineapple, water chestnuts, and bamboo shoots, stirring thoroughly and covering to cook for an additional two or three minutes.
6. Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir constantly. Turn heat to medium until the sauce just barely bubbles and thickens.
7. Serve with basmati rice, quinoa, or your preferred grain.
